# MAC Terminal — Market Action Center

> Simplify Your Trading

## What is MAC Terminal?
MAC Terminal (Market Action Center) is a free trading tools dashboard for beginner to intermediate stock traders. It provides a clean, all-in-one workspace for daily market preparation and trade analysis — no brokerage connection required.

## Website
https://marketactioncenter.com

## Key Features
- **Morning Mindset**: AI-generated daily market outlook covering regime, breadth, and sector themes
- **Market Overview**: Real-time market regime (risk-on/risk-off), breadth direction, sector heat check, top headlines, economic calendar
- **Setup Scanner**: Scans the full US stock market for compression setups with momentum — finds stocks coiling near moving averages with rising volume
- **Top Ideas**: Quick scan of 50 popular tickers scored by compression, alignment, extension, and relative volume
- **AI Trade Journal**: Import trade history via CSV, get AI-powered performance analysis and coaching
- **AI Trade Analysis**: Analyze individual trades with AI — get setup summaries, pattern review, and improvement suggestions
- **Watchlist**: Track your favorite tickers with live prices and personal notes
- **TradingView Charts**: Click any ticker to view a daily chart popup (15-min delayed)

## Who Is It For?
- Beginner to intermediate stock traders
- Swing traders and day traders looking for daily market prep
- Traders who want AI-assisted journaling and trade review
- Anyone who wants a simple, fast, distraction-free trading dashboard

## Tech Stack
- Hosted on Vercel
- Authentication via Supabase (email + Google sign-in)
- Market data from Polygon.io
- AI features powered by Anthropic Claude
- Charts from TradingView (free widget)

## Pricing
Free to use. No credit card required.

## Contact
support@marketactioncenter.com
